title: Golpe a La Mafia
overview: Valdemar Mendoza, a respected police officer, is falsely accused of orchestrating an attack on the commander’s daughter and is arrested.  With no one willing to believe his innocence, fellow officer Rojas risks everything to help Valdemar escape from jail. Forced into hiding, the two men become fugitives hunted by the very law they once served.  To survive, they align themselves with powerful mafia bosses, entering a dangerous underworld where loyalty is uncertain and every move could mean life or death. As the conspiracy behind the accusation begins to unravel, Valdemar and Rojas must decide how far they are willing to go to clear their names.  An action-packed story filled with betrayal, shifting alliances, and a shocking twist involving the notorious “Hit the Mafia.”
